provenance.source: Discogs monthly data dump (CC0), one-hop working set
provenance.license: Derived from the Discogs monthly CC0 data dumps. See docs/DATA_AND_RIGHTS.md.
provenance.note: Real records, not synthetic. A round's answer is a performer with an explicit, displayable instrument or vocal credit on both displayed albums directly (or, for a two-hop round, on the hidden middle album). The private collection seed used to build the working set this catalog is drawn from is never published.
